---
title: "Session Chair at ICCOPT 2025"
date: "2025-07-01"
categories: [service, conferences]
description: "Chaired the session: Optimization on Manifolds and Geometric Approaches. Moreover, presented a talk on convergence rates for nonsmooth Riemannian optimization."
---
I had the pleasure of serving as a Session Chair for "Optimization on Manifolds and Geometric Approaches" at the International Conference on Continuous Optimization (ICCOPT) in Summer 2025. Additionally, I gave a talk on my recent work on nonsmooth Riemannian optimization during this session.
